subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord, my Support, my highest Hope and most cherished Aspiration! The tongue of my inner and outer being testifieth unto Thy oneness and singleness
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و سیدی و سندی و مقصودی و غایه رجائی و منتهی املی یشهد لسان ظاهری و باطنی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for martyrs, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for protection, @transcendence; unknowability of God
